{past_section}{user_ctx}Produce compact revision instructions for the poet (~100–150 words). Be SPECIFIC: name which lines or sections need changes. The poet will make ONLY these changes — do not ask for broad rewrites. Bullet or numbered list. No preamble. Actionable only.
